CATalyst AI

From aspirant to IIM admit

Real journeys. Real struggles. Real success stories.

P

Priya Sharma

B.Tech CS, Tier-2 College
IIM Ahmedabad, PGP 2024
99.8
CAT Percentile
Attempts: 1 • First attempt!

"I was a working professional with just 3 hours daily. CATalyst's AI plan made every minute count. The DILR practice sets were exactly like actual CAT. I went from 78 to 99.8 percentile in 8 months."

The Journey

1
Started: 78%ile in first diagnostic
2
Month 3: 89%ile in mock
3
Month 6: 95%ile consistently
4
CAT 2023: 99.8%ile
Winning Strategy

"Focused on DILR first (weakest), then maintained QA and VARC momentum"

IIM Bangalore, PGPM 2024
99.3
CAT Percentile
Attempts: 2 • Cracked it!

"First attempt: 91 percentile, not enough. Used CATalyst for the second attempt. The AI doubt solver saved me 3 hours per day. I solved more questions in 4 months than in 12 months before."

The Journey

1
Attempt 1: 91%ile (fell short)
2
Month 2: AI rebuilt study plan
3
Month 4: Consistent 97+ in mocks
4
Attempt 2: 99.3%ile
Winning Strategy

"Mock analysis was the key. Solved every mistake before moving forward."

S

Sneha Patel

CA Dropout, 1 year gap
FMS Delhi, MBA 2024
99.1
CAT Percentile
Attempts: 1 • First attempt!

"People said a CA dropout with a gap year can't crack CAT. CATalyst's AI built a custom plan ignoring my gaps. The daily streak kept me going even on bad days. 99.1 — I proved everyone wrong."

The Journey

1
Started from scratch
2
Month 2: 82%ile baseline
3
Month 5: 94%ile mock average
4
CAT 2023: 99.1%ile
Winning Strategy

"Consistency > Intensity. Never missed a single daily session for 7 months."
